title: Fix Data Type Filter Pointing at Wrong Column Index
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the data type filter to correctly filter by data type and the field name filter to target the correct column, so that I can find fields efficiently.
description: The data type filter in the data dictionary was not filtering by the data type column — it was likely pointing at the wrong field index. The field name filter also may have been targeting the wrong column.
acceptance_criteria: Data type filter correctly filters rows by data type column
Field name filter targets the correct column
ux_changes: Fixed data type and field name filter column references in the data dictionary table.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue and requested review.
